column1: # Page numbers advance across successive Gos in the same print session.
# Align resets the counter to 1; Clear wipes the per-session settings
# (header, footer, margins, pg-length) back to defaults.
# Two Gos in a row: the second advances page numbering.
# After Go #1 (pages 1..2) and Go #2 (pages 3..4), the file holds the
# Align resets the counter; next Go writes pages 1..2 again.
# Clear wipes the header. A subsequent Go's output has no "P<n>".
# Quit exits the print session; no active_path lingers.
